name: Lead Intake & Dedup Pipeline - Google Sheets Demo

parameters.jsCode:
// Change this value to test another branch: 'invalid', 'duplicate', or 'valid'.
const TEST_CASE = 'invalid';

const now = new Date().toISOString();
const telegramSafe = (value) => String(value ?? '')
  .replace(/[\u0000-\u001F\u007F]/g, ' ')
  .replace(/[<>*_`\[\]()~#+\-=|{}.!]/g, ' ')
  .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
  .trim();

const base = {
  source_row_number: 2,
  processed_at: now,
  created_at: '2026-05-19 14:30',
  source: 'mock_node',
  name: 'Mock Lead',
  phone: '+1 555 010 2001',
  email: 'mock.lead@example.com',
  phone_normalized: '15550102001',
  email_normalized: 'mock.lead@example.com',
  message: 'Manual branch test from mock node',
  raw_payload: 'mock test payload',
  utm_source: 'codex_test',
};

const cases = {
  invalid: {
    ...base,
    name: 'No Contact Lead',
    phone: '',
    email: '',
    phone_normalized: '',
    email_normalized: '',
    dedup_key: '',
    lead_id: '',
    is_invalid: true,
    is_duplicate: false,
    matched_lead_id: '',
    duplicate_reason: '',
    action: 'invalid_lead',
    status: 'invalid',
    notes: 'missing_or_invalid_contact',
    error_reason: 'missing_or_invalid_contact',
    audit_message: 'Lead did not pass validation',
  },
  duplicate: {
    ...base,
    name: 'Duplicate Mock Lead',
    dedup_key: 'phone:15550102001',
    lead_id: 'demo_phone_15550102001',
    is_invalid: false,
    is_duplicate: true,
    matched_lead_id: 'demo_phone_15550102001',
    duplicate_reason: 'mock_duplicate_branch_test',
    action: 'duplicate_detected',
    status: 'duplicate',
    notes: 'Duplicate lead detected',
    error_reason: '',
    audit_message: 'Duplicate lead logged',
  },
  valid: {
    ...base,
    name: 'Valid Mock Lead',
    phone: '+1 555 010 2999',
    phone_normalized: '15550102999',
    dedup_key: 'phone:15550102999',
    lead_id: 'demo_phone_15550102999',
    is_invalid: false,
    is_duplicate: false,
    matched_lead_id: '',
    duplicate_reason: '',
    action: 'valid_lead_created',
    status: 'valid',
    notes: 'New valid lead',
    error_reason: '',
    audit_message: 'New valid lead appended',
  },
};

const selected = cases[TEST_CASE] || cases.invalid;

return [{
  json: {
    ...selected,
    telegram_new_message: `New qualified lead\nName: ${telegramSafe(selected.name) || 'not provided'}\nContact: ${telegramSafe(selected.phone_normalized) || 'no phone'} / ${telegramSafe(selected.email_normalized) || 'no email'}\nSource: ${telegramSafe(selected.source) || 'unknown'}\nUTM: ${telegramSafe(selected.utm_source) || 'none'}\nAction: added to valid leads`,
    telegram_duplicate_message: `Duplicate lead detected\nName: ${telegramSafe(selected.name) || 'not provided'}\nDedup key: ${telegramSafe(selected.dedup_key) || 'none'}\nMatched lead: ${telegramSafe(selected.matched_lead_id) || 'unknown'}\nAction: logged to duplicates`,
    telegram_invalid_message: `Invalid lead\nSource: ${telegramSafe(selected.source) || 'unknown'}\nName: ${telegramSafe(selected.name) || 'not provided'}\nReason: ${telegramSafe(selected.error_reason) || 'unknown'}\nAction: logged to invalid leads`,
  },
}];

meta.notes: Credential IDs, chat IDs, sheet IDs, and private values are placeholders. Reconnect credentials in n8n before running.
